short_blurb: Dependable roofing for Temple City homes and commercial properties.
local_note: Temple City is a quiet residential city known for its excellent schools and well-maintained neighborhoods. The housing stock skews older, with many 1950s–70s homes carrying original composition roofs or single-ply overlays. We regularly replace these in a single day for average-sized homes, with minimal disruption to the neighborhood. We're familiar with Temple City's building permit process and pull permits on every job.

faqs.q: How long does a roof replacement take in Temple City?
faqs.a: Most single-family homes in Temple City can be torn off and re-roofed in one day. Tile roofs typically take two to three days. We'll give you a specific timeline at the time of your free estimate.
